summary: Iteration 10 testing complete. All 59 backend tests pass (100%). Verified new System Monitor panel with real OS metrics (CPU, RAM, disk, network, temperature, process info via psutil) and improved TelemetryCharts with visible Y-axis labels, current value readouts, auto-scaling with padding, and Barometer chart. All 7 tabs working. Backend /api/performance now returns 'engine' and 'system' keys structure.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) - cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 verified new features: 1) System Monitor panel (renamed from PerformancePanel) now shows real OS metrics - CPU percentage with per-core breakdown, RAM usage, temperature (0°C in container, works on Pi), disk usage, network TX/RX rates, process info. 2) TelemetryCharts improved with visible Y-axis labels, current value readouts (R:, P: for attitude; X:, Y:, Z: for gyro; hPa for barometer), auto-scaling with padding, and new Barometer chart. 3) Backend /api/performance now returns nested structure with 'engine' (C++ runtime metrics) and 'system' (OS metrics via psutil) keys. 4) WebSocket /api/ws/telemetry includes system_metrics field. All 59 backend tests pass. Updated test file to reflect new API structure.
